storefront.title: [ar-EG] KiX Storefront
storefront.cart.items: [ar-EG] {count, plural, =0 {Cart is empty} one {1 item in cart} other {# items in cart}}
storefront.meta.title: [ar-EG] Discover stores · KiX
storefront.meta.description: [ar-EG] Browse and play at thousands of merchant stores on KiX — earn rewards from your favourite brands.
storefront.search.placeholder_hero: [ar-EG] Search by store name, category, or location
storefront.hero.title: [ar-EG] Discover stores. Play games. Earn rewards.
storefront.hero.lede: [ar-EG] Browse thousands of merchant storefronts across Singapore. Play branded mini-games at checkout and unlock real vouchers, free items, and exclusive perks.
storefront.filters.label: [ar-EG] Filter
storefront.results.count: [ar-EG] {count, plural, =0 {No stores} one {1 store} other {# stores}}
storefront.empty.no_results: [ar-EG] No stores match your filters yet.
storefront.footer.about: [ar-EG] KiX is the gamified acquisition platform for local merchants. Discover stores, play to earn, and turn every visit into a reward.
